title: X-RAY DETECTOR WITH HIGH SPATIAL RESOLUTION; 具有高空间解析度的X射线检测器
abstract:
公开了一种适合于检测X射线的装置，系统和方法。该装置包括：X射线吸收层(110)和掩模(301)；其中该掩模(301)包括第一视窗(3010)和第二视窗(3011)，以及该第一视窗(3010)和该第二视窗(3011)之间的部分；其中第一和第二视窗(3010,3011)对于入射X射线不是非透明的；并且其中第一和第二视窗(3010,3011)被设置使得由传播通过第一视窗(3010)的X射线光子在X射线吸收层(110)中产生的载流子和由传播通过第二视窗(3011)的X射线光子在X射线吸收层(110)中产生的载流子在空间上不重叠。

A device, system and method suitable for detecting X-rays are disclosed. The device includes: an X-ray absorbing layer (110) and a mask (301); wherein the mask (301) includes a first window (3010) and a second window (3011), and the first window (3010) and the The part between the second windows (3011); where the first and second windows (3010, 3011) are not opaque to incident X-rays; and where the first and second windows (3010, 3011) are set so as to be propagated by Carriers generated in the X-ray absorbing layer (110) by X-ray photons passing through the first window (3010) and generated in the X-ray absorbing layer (110) by X-ray photons propagating through the second window (3011) The carriers do not overlap in space.
claims:
1 •一种适合于检测X射线的装置,所述装置包括： X射线吸收层和掩模； 其中所述掩模包括第一视窗和第二视窗，以及所述第一视窗和所述第二视窗之间的部 分； 其中所述第一和第二视窗对于入射X射线不是非透明的； 其中所述部分对于所述入射X射线是非透明的;并且 其中所述第一和第二视窗被设置使得由传播通过所述第一视窗的X射线光子在所述X 射线吸收层中产生的载流子和由传播通过所述第二视窗的X射线光子在所述X射线吸收层 中产生的载流子在空间上不重叠。 2. 如权利要求1所述的装置，其中所述第一视窗和所述第二视窗是最近邻。 3. 如权利要求1所述的装置，其中所述装置进一步包括:第一组一个或多个电极，其配 置成接收来自传播通过所述第一视窗的入射X射线的信号;和第二组一个或多个电极，其配 置成接收来自传播通过所述第二视窗的入射X射线的信号。 4. 如权利要求3所述的装置，其中接收所述信号包括收集由所述入射X射线产生的载流 子。 5. 如权利要求1所述的装置,其中所述第一视窗或所述第二视窗或两者包括一个或多 个通孔或一个或多个盲孔或其组合。 6. 如权利要求1所述的装置,其中所述第一视窗或所述第二视窗或两者包括一个或多 个通槽或一个或多个盲槽或其组合。 7. 如权利要求1所述的装置,其中所述第一视窗或所述第二视窗或两者包括与所述部 分的材料不同的材料。 8. 如权利要求1所述的装置,其中所述的掩模包括金属。 9. 一种系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线源，其中所述系统组合成用于对 人的胸部或腹部进行X射线放射摄影。 10 •一种系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线源，其中所述系统组态用于对人 的口腔进行X射线放射摄影。 11·一种货物扫描或非侵入式检查(Nil)系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线 源，其中所述的货物扫描或非侵入式检查(Nil)系统组态成用于基于背散射X射线来形成图 像。 12. —种货物扫描或非侵入式检查(Nil)系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线 源，其中所述的货物扫描或非侵入式检查(Nil)系统组态成用于基于通过被检查物体的X射 线来形成图像。 13. —种全身扫描器系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线源。 14. 一种X射线电脑断层摄影(X射线CT)系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置和X射线 源。 15. —种电子显微镜，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置，电子源和电子光学系统。 16. —种系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置,其中所述系统组态用于测量X射线源的 剂量。 17. —种系统，其包括如权利要求1所述的装置，其中所述系统是X射线望远镜,Χ射线显 微镜或X射线显微CT系统或其中所述系统组合成用于进行乳房摄影，工业缺陷检测,显微放 射摄影,铸件检查,焊缝检查或数字减影血管摄影。 18. —种适合于相衬X射线成像(PCI)的系统，所述系统包括： 如权利要求1所述的装置； 第二X射线检测器；以及 间隔物，其中所述装置和所述第二X射线检测器被所述间隔物隔开。 19. 如权利要求18所述的系统，其中所述装置和所述第二X射线检测器配置成用于分别 同时捕捉物体的图像。 20. 如权利要求18所述的系统,其中所述第二X射线检测器等同于所述装置。 21. —种适合于相衬X射线成像(PCI)的系统，所述系统包括如权利要求1所述的装置, 其中所述装置配置用于移动物体并且捕捉其图像，所述物体暴露于在离所述物体不同距离 的入射X射线。 22. —种使用如权利要求1所述的装置的方法，所述方法包括： 将所述装置放置在相对于场景的多个位置处； 用在所述多个位置处的装置获得数据； 从所述数据编译所述场景的图像。 23. 如权利要求22所述的方法,其中获得数据包括使所述装置相对于所述场景移动。 24. 如权利要求22所述的方法,其中获得数据包括使所述场景相对于所述装置移动。 25. 如权利要求22所述的方法，其中获得数据包括使透镜相对于所述场景和所述装置 移动。 26. 如权利要求22所述的方法，其中获得数据包括测量传播通过每个所述视窗的入射X 射线的强度。

title: IMAGE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD, DEVICE, ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT AND MEDIUM; 图像瑕疵检测方法、装置、电子设备及介质
abstract:
本申请涉及图像分析技术，本申请提供一种图像瑕疵检测方法、装置、电子设备及介质。该方法能够获取待检测图像，确定所述待检测图像所属的领域，并基于所述领域，从预先构建好的卷积神经网络中确定目标卷积层，利用所述目标卷积层提取所述待检测图像的待检测特征，根据所述待检测特征确定所述待检测图像的目标分数，确定与所述领域对应的分数阈值，当所述目标分数小于所述分数阈值时，将所述待检测图像确定为有瑕疵图像。本申请能够提高瑕疵检测的准确度。

The present application relates to image analysis technology, and the present application provides an image defect detection method, device, electronic device and medium. The method can obtain an image to be detected, determine the field to which the image to be detected belongs, and based on the field, determine a target convolution layer from a pre-built convolutional neural network, use the target convolution layer to extract the features to be detected of the image to be detected, determine the target score of the image to be detected based on the features to be detected, determine a score threshold corresponding to the field, and when the target score is less than the score threshold, determine the image to be detected as a defective image. The present application can improve the accuracy of defect detection.
claims:
1 .一种图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，所述图像瑕疵检测方法包括： 获取待检测图像； 确定所述待检测图像所属的领域，并基于所述领域，从预先构建好的卷积神经网络中确定目标卷积层； 利用所述目标卷积层提取所述待检测图像的待检测特征； 根据所述待检测特征确定所述待检测图像的目标分数； 获取所述领域上的多张训练图像，所述多张训练图像包括瑕疵图像及正常图像； 确定与所述领域对应的分数阈值，包括:将所述瑕疵图像及所述正常图像输入至所述目标卷积层中进行卷积处理，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一特征图及所述正常图像的第二特征图;从所述卷积神经网络中确定与所述目标卷积层对应的目标池化层;利用所述目标池化层对所述第一特征图及所述第二特征图进行池化处理，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一向量及所述正常图像的第二向量;将所述第一向量及所述第二向量输入至预先训练好的高斯混合模型，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一分数及所述正常图像的第二分数;确定所述第一分数与所述第二分数的均值分数，并确定所述第一分数与所述第二分数的标准偏差;将所述标准偏差乘以预设数值，得到运算结果，并将所述均值分数与所述运算结果相减，得到所述分数阈值； 当所述目标分数小于所述分数阈值时，将所述待检测图像确定为有瑕疵图像。 2 .如权利要求1所述的图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，所述获取待检测图像包括以下一种或者多种方式的组合： 确定检测对象，并利用摄像装置拍摄所述检测对象，得到所述待检测图像;及/或从配置库中获取带有预设标识的图像作为所述待检测图像;及/或利用网络爬虫工具从预设网页上爬取所述待检测图像。 3 .如权利要求1所述的图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，所述基于所述领域，从预先构建好的卷积神经网络中确定目标卷积层包括： 从所述卷积神经网络的任意卷积层中提取卷积核，所述卷积神经网络包括多个卷积层; 利用提取的每个卷积核对每张训练图像进行卷积运算，得到每个卷积层上的多张特征图像; 对每个卷积层上的每张特征图像进行池化处理，得到每个卷积层上的多个低维向量； 利用T-SNE算法对每个低维向量进行可视化处理，得到每个卷积层上的多张训练图像的分布图像； 根据每个卷积层的分布图像确定所述目标卷积层。 4 .如权利要求1所述的图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，所述根据所述待检测特征确定所述待检测图像的目标分数包括： 对所述待检测特征进行均值池化处理，得到目标向量； 将所述目标向量输入至所述高斯混合模型中，得到所述目标分数。 5 .如权利要求1所述的图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，在将所述待检测图像确定为有瑕疵图像之后，所述图像瑕疵检测方法还包括： 确定所述有瑕疵图像的目标数量； 当所述目标数量大于预设数量时,根据所述有瑕疵图像生成告警信息； 采用对称加密算法加密所述告警信息，得到密文； 根据所述目标数量确定所述密文的告警等级； 根据所述告警等级确定告警方式； 以所述告警方式发送所述密文。 6 .如权利要求1所述的图像瑕疵检测方法，其特征在于，所述图像瑕疵检测方法还包括： 当所述目标分数大于或者等于所述分数阈值时，将所述待检测图像确定为无瑕疵图像。 7 .一种图像瑕疵检测装置，其特征在于，所述图像瑕疵检测装置包括： 获取单元，用于获取待检测图像； 确定单元，用于确定所述待检测图像所属的领域，并基于所述领域，从预先构建好的卷积神经网络中确定目标卷积层； 提取单元，用于利用所述目标卷积层提取所述待检测图像的待检测特征； 所述确定单元，还用于根据所述待检测特征确定所述待检测图像的目标分数； 所述获取单元，还用于获取所述领域上的多张训练图像，所述多张训练图像包括瑕疵图像及正常图像； 所述确定单元，还用于确定与所述领域对应的分数阈值，包括:将所述瑕疵图像及所述正常图像输入至所述目标卷积层中进行卷积处理，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一特征图及所述正常图像的第二特征图;从所述卷积神经网络中确定与所述目标卷积层对应的目标池化层;利用所述目标池化层对所述第一特征图及所述第二特征图进行池化处理，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一向量及所述正常图像的第二向量;将所述第一向量及所述第二向量输入至预先训练好的高斯混合模型，得到所述瑕疵图像的第一分数及所述正常图像的第二分数;确定所述第一分数与所述第二分数的均值分数，并确定所述第一分数与所述第二分数的标准偏差；将所述标准偏差乘以预设数值，得到运算结果，并将所述均值分数与所述运算结果相减，得到所述分数阈值； 所述确定单元，还用于当所述目标分数小于所述分数阈值时，将所述待检测图像确定为有瑕疵图像。 8 . 一种电子设备，其特征在于，所述电子设备包括： 存储器，存储至少一个指令;及处理器，获取所述存储器中存储的指令以实现如权利要求1至6中任意一项所述的图像瑕疵检测方法。 9 .一种计算机可读存储介质，其特征在于:所述计算机可读存储介质中存储有至少一个指令，所述至少一个指令被电子设备中的处理器获取以实现如权利要求1至6中任意一项所述的图像瑕疵检测方法。

1 .An image defect detection method, characterized in that the image defect detection method comprises: obtaining an image to be detected; determining the field to which the image to be detected belongs, and based on the field, determining a target convolution layer from a pre-constructed convolutional neural network; extracting features to be detected of the image to be detected using the target convolution layer; determining a target score of the image to be detected based on the features to be detected; obtaining multiple training images in the field, wherein the multiple training images include defective images and normal images; Determining a score threshold corresponding to the field includes: inputting the defect image and the normal image into the target convolution layer for convolution processing to obtain a first feature map of the defect image and a second feature map of the normal image; determining a target pooling layer corresponding to the target convolution layer from the convolution neural network; performing pooling processing on the first feature map and the second feature map using the target pooling layer to obtain a first vector of the defect image and a second vector of the normal image; inputting the first vector and the second vector into a pre-trained Gaussian mixture model to obtain a first score of the defect image and a second score of the normal image; determining a mean score of the first score and the second score, and determining a standard deviation of the first score and the second score; multiplying the standard deviation by a preset value to obtain a calculation result, and subtracting the mean score from the calculation result to obtain the score threshold; When the target score is less than the score threshold, the image to be detected is determined as a defective image. 2 .The image defect detection method as described in claim 1 is characterized in that the acquisition of the image to be detected includes a combination of one or more of the following methods: determining a detection object and photographing the detection object using a camera device to obtain the image to be detected; inputting the target vector into the Gaussian mixture model to obtain the target score. 5 .The image defect detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that, after determining the image to be detected as a defective image, the image defect detection method further comprises: determining the target number of the defective image; When the number of targets is greater than a preset number, an alarm message is generated according to the defective image; the alarm message is encrypted using a symmetric encryption algorithm to obtain a ciphertext; an alarm level of the ciphertext is determined according to the number of targets; an alarm mode is determined according to the alarm level; and the ciphertext is sent in the alarm mode. 6 .The image defect detection method according to claim 1 is characterized in that the image defect detection method further comprises: when the target score is greater than or equal to the score threshold, determining the image to be detected as a flawless image. 7 .An image defect detection device, characterized in that the image defect detection device comprises: an acquisition unit, used to acquire an image to be detected; a determination unit, used to determine the field to which the image to be detected belongs, and based on the field, determine a target convolution layer from a pre-constructed convolutional neural network; an extraction unit, used to extract the features to be detected of the image to be detected using the target convolution layer; the determination unit is also used to determine the target score of the image to be detected based on the features to be detected; the acquisition unit is also used to acquire multiple training images in the field, and the multiple training images include defective images and normal images; The determination unit is also used to determine a score threshold corresponding to the field, including: inputting the defect image and the normal image into the target convolution layer for convolution processing to obtain a first feature map of the defect image and a second feature map of the normal image; determining a target pooling layer corresponding to the target convolution layer from the convolution neural network; performing pooling processing on the first feature map and the second feature map using the target pooling layer to obtain a first vector of the defect image and a second vector of the normal image; inputting the first vector and the second vector into a pre-trained Gaussian mixture model to obtain a first score of the defect image and a second score of the normal image; determining a mean score of the first score and the second score, and determining a standard deviation of the first score and the second score; multiplying the standard deviation by a preset value to obtain a calculation result, and subtracting the mean score from the calculation result to obtain the score threshold; The determination unit is also used to determine the image to be detected as a defective image when the target score is less than the score threshold. 8 . An electronic device, characterized in that the electronic device comprises: a memory storing at least one instruction; and a processor acquiring the instruction stored in the memory to implement the image defect detection method as described in any one of claims 1 to 6. 9 .A computer-readable storage medium, characterized in that: the computer-readable storage medium stores at least one instruction, and the at least one instruction is obtained by a processor in an electronic device to implement the image defect detection method as described in any one of claims 1 to 6.

title: IMAGE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD, DEVICE, ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND MEDIUM; 图像瑕疵检测方法、装置、电子设备及介质
abstract:
本申请涉及图像分析技术，本申请提供一种图像瑕疵检测方法、装置、电子设备及介质。该方法能够获取待检测图像，确定所述待检测图像所属的领域，并基于所述领域，从预先构建好的卷积神经网络中确定目标卷积层，利用所述目标卷积层提取所述待检测图像的待检测特征，根据所述待检测特征确定所述待检测图像的目标分数，确定与所述领域对应的分数阈值，当所述目标分数小于所述分数阈值时，将所述待检测图像确定为有瑕疵图像。本申请能够提高瑕疵检测的准确度。

The present application relates to image analysis technology, and provides an image defect detection method, device, electronic device and medium. The method can acquire an image to be detected, determine the field to which the image to be detected belongs, and based on the field, determine a target convolutional layer from a pre-built convolutional neural network, and use the target convolutional layer to extract the target convolutional layer. The to-be-detected feature of the image to be detected, the target score of the to-be-detected image is determined according to the to-be-detected feature, the score threshold corresponding to the field is determined, and when the target score is less than the score threshold, the target score of the to-be-detected image is determined. The inspection image is determined to be a defective image. The present application can improve the accuracy of defect detection.

title: AN AUTOMATIC SYSTEM FOR ABNORMAL MUSCULOSKELETAL DETECTION AND INTERPRETATION
abstract: The present invention relates to an automatic system for abnormal musculoskeletal detection and interpretation through x- ray on mobile phone.Musculoskeletal conditions become very severe health problems that affect muscles, bones, and joints. Various Musculoskeletal disorders are bone fractures, tendinitis, carpal tunnel, syndrome, osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis etc.The X ray radiograph in the form of dicom images from MURA dataset are converted to jpeg images. The system also collects information about the body part from the user. Depending upon the body part like elbow, hand, shoulder etc., the associated features get extracted. Now the pertained model detects the abnormality and localizes it. The localize part gets compared with the images without abnormality, the severity is noted with percentage of abnormality. After this process, the labelling of the abnormal parts will be defined using the set of features associated with it.
claims: I/We Claim: 1. An automatic system for abnormal musculoskeletal detection and interpretation, comprising of; a processing unit configured to receive X-ray images in the form of dicom files and convert them to jpeg images for analysis; a convolutional neural network (CNN) trained on a dataset of musculoskeletal radiographs (MURA) enabled for detecting abnormalities within X-ray images; a user interface allowing selection of specific body parts for analysis, enabling the extraction of associated features relevant to the chosen body part; an abnormality detection and localization module using the trained deep learning model comparing abnormal localized parts with normal images to determine the severity of abnormalities; a report generation module that interprets localized abnormalities and generates summarized reports in native languages using natural language processing (NLP), presenting understandable labels for identified abnormalities; wherein a transmission of generated reports to mobile devices while ensuring data security processed through block chain technology, enabling secure access to patient records; and an accessibility to healthcare professionals provided through a cloud-based storage of reports, aiding in remote diagnostics and decisionmaking. Dated: 22/11/2023 Adv. Swapnil Jayantrao Gawande Agent for the applicant [IN/PA 1587]

title: IMAGE PROCESSING DEVICE AND CONTROL METHOD THEREOF; 图像处理装置及其控制方法
abstract:
本发明提供了图像处理装置及其控制方法。生成使得能够更合适地检测变化的图像。该图像处理装置获取从第一视点位置拍摄包括对象的场景的第一图像、以及从不同于所述第一视点位置的第二视点位置拍摄包括所述对象的场景的第二图像；并将所述第一图像上与所述对象的特征的位置相对应的坐标位置，同所述第二图像上与所述对象的特征的位置相对应的坐标位置相关联。该图像处理装置基于所述关联，确定所述第二图像中与所述第一图像中的给定区域相对应的部分区域；通过使用所确定的部分区域的图像替换所述第一图像中的所述给定区域的图像，来生成合成图像；并且通过将表示在所述对象中发生的变化的变化数据叠加在所述合成图像上，来显示所述变化数据。

The present invention provides an image processing device and a control method thereof. Generate images that enable more appropriate detection of changes. The image processing device acquires a first image of a scene including an object taken from a first viewpoint position and a second image of a scene including the object taken from a second viewpoint position different from the first viewpoint position; and The coordinate position corresponding to the position of the feature of the object on the first image is associated with the coordinate position corresponding to the position of the feature of the object on the second image. The image processing device determines a partial region in the second image corresponding to a given region in the first image based on the association; by replacing the image of the determined partial region in the first image. The image of the given area is used to generate a composite image; and the change data representing the change occurring in the object is displayed by superimposing the change data on the composite image.

llm_reviewer_comment_short: 課題との接点はあるが、技術手段が一般語寄りで具体的な候補としては慎重な確認が必要である。
llm_reviewer_comment_detail: 課題文脈は空欄または本文の問題点としては不十分である。解決手段文脈は処理手順やモデル構成を読み取れる。技術手段は関連するが一般語・抽象語が中心である。画像中の異常・対象領域検出という水準では参考になるが、対象や用途のずれを人手で確認する必要がある。
human_reviewer_comment: 画像変化検出・画像生成に関する特許であり、画像処理候補としては関係するが、製造欠陥検出との直接対応は弱い。

title: METHODS FOR TRAINING A NEURAL NETWORK AND FOR DETECTING ANOMALIES IN A MANUFACTURING PRODUCT, INSPECTION SYSTEM FOR DETECTING ANOMALIES IN A MANUFACTURING PRODUCT, AND, NON-TRANSITORY COMPUTER-READABLE MEDIA; MÉTODOS PARA TREINAMENTO DE UMA REDE NEURAL E PARA DETECÇÃO DE ANOMALIAS EM UM PRODUTO DE MANUFATURA, SISTEMA DE INSPEÇÃO PARA DETECÇÃO DE ANOMALIAS EM UM PRODUTO DE MANUFATURA, E, MÍDIA LEGÍVEL POR COMPUTADOR NÃO TRANSITÓRIA
claims:
1. Método para treinamento de uma rede neural para detecção de anomalias em um produto de manufatura, o método caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende: obter (201, 401) um conjunto de dados que inclui múltiplas imagens de produto de manufatura e arquivos de anotação com coordenadas de regiões anômalas predeterminadas em cada imagem de produto de manufatura; selecionar um conjunto de consulta de teste e um conjunto de suporte de imagens a partir do conjunto de dados múltiplas vezes para treinar um modelo de deep learning, em que o conjunto de suporte de imagens compreende pares de imagens de referência e cada par compreende pelo menos uma imagem de produto de manufatura anômalo e não anômalo; inserir o conjunto de consulta de teste (207, 404) em um modelo de deep learning para inferir um escore de similaridade com base na distância do espaço latente entre pares de imagens de referência do conjunto de suporte e a imagem de consulta de teste; e ajustar os parâmetros do modelo de deep learning por meio de um modelo com base no escore de similaridade. 2. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 1, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: gerar (202) dados sintéticos pelo processamento do conjunto de dados brutos para aplicar anomalias sintéticas nas múltiplas imagens de produto de manufatura; aplicar os dados sintéticos para o treinamento de uma rede deep learning, que visaidentificar regiões de interesse relevantes (ROIs) de cada uma das múltiplas imagens de produto de manufatura com anomalias simbólicas. 3. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 2, caracterizado pelo Petição 870230070037, de 08/08/2023, pág. 62/72 2 / 5 fato de que compreende adicionalmente: gerar (203) arquivos de anotação que compreendem coordenadas de ROIs relevantes e regiões anômalas dos dados sintéticos; e gerar (204) um conjunto de dados composto pela aplicação de data augmentation sobre os dados sintéticos. 4. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 2 ou 3, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: treinar (205) um módulo detector de objeto com o conjunto de dados composto para transmitir um objeto tensorial que contém coordenadas de cada um dos objetos detectados e a respectiva identificação de classe; e ajustar a saída do módulo detector de objeto como a entrada do modelo de score de similaridade. 5. Método de acordo com qualquer uma das reivindicações 2 a 4, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: processar (206) os dados sintéticos para gerar um conjunto de dados ROI com base nos arquivos de anotação e no conjunto de dados brutos, em que os dados de ROI compreendem dois conjuntos de ROIs com ROIs anômalas e não anômalas, respectivamente. 6. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 5, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: selecionar dois conjuntos aleatórios de imagens de ROIs a partir dos dados de ROI, o primeiro compreendendo imagens sem anomalias e o segundo compreendendo imagens com múltiplas anomalias. 7. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 5 ou 6, caracterizado pelo fato de que o conjunto de consulta de teste é comparado com os dois conjuntos aleatórios de imagens da ROI para treinar o modelo de similaridade, e em que o conjunto de consulta de teste e o conjunto de suporte fixo são selecionados a partir dos dados de ROI. 8. Método de acordo com qualquer uma das reivindicações 5 a Petição 870230070037, de 08/08/2023, pág. 63/72 3 / 5 7, caracterizado pelo fato de que processar (206) os dados sintéticos para gerar dados de ROI compreende adicionalmente: importar (251) imagens originais a partir do conjunto de dados de treinamento com as respectivas anotações para cada imagem; e executar (252) um laço de iteração para filtragem das imagens em relação aos recortes e às anomalias, em que uma imagem do conjunto de dados deve ser importada para cada iteração. 9. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 8, caracterizado pelo fato de que processar (206) os dados sintéticos para gerar dados de ROI compreende adicionalmente: obter (254) anotações de caixa delimitadora, BBox, da respectiva imagem iterada e armazenar os dados. 10. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 9, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente, caso a imagem compreenda múltiplas ROIs e anomalias, armazenar (255) a imagem como um objeto iterável e executar um laço através de todas as ROIs e anomalias; registrar (256) cada iteração da ROI no interior da imagem iterada; executar (257) um laço para cada anomalia na ROI iterada; e calcular (258) a área de interseção entre a ROI iterada e a anomalia iterada, se a área de interseção for maior do que zero e superar um patamar limite, determinar (260) a ROI iterada como uma ROI anômala e salvar (261) a ROI em uma pasta de ROI anômala. 11. Método para detecção de anomalias em um produto de manufatura, o método caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende: obter pelo menos uma imagem de um produto de manufatura a ser inspecionado; inserir a imagem obtida em uma rede neural treinada para Petição 870230070037, de 08/08/2023, pág. 64/72 4 / 5 comparar uma imagem de produto de manufatura com pares de imagens de referência que compreendem imagens de produto de manufatura anômalo e não anômalo, em que as imagens de referência são armazenadas como um conjunto de suporte; inferir o escore de distância de similaridade entre a imagem obtida e os pares de imagens de referência; e determinar se o produto de manufatura é anômalo com base no escore de distância de similaridade. 12. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 11, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: ajustar um outro conjunto de suporte que compreende imagens de uma versão diferente do produto de manufatura. 13. Sistema de inspeção para detecção de anomalias em um produto de manufatura, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende: um sistema de formação de imagem configurado para obter uma imagem de um produto de manufatura; e um sistema de computador que compreende um dispositivo de memória e um processador, em que o sistema de computador é conectado no sistema de formação de imagem; o processador é configurado para: obter pelo menos uma imagem de um produto de manufatura a ser inspecionado; inserir a imagem obtida em uma rede neural treinada para comparar uma imagem de produto de manufatura com pares de imagens de referência que compreendem imagens de produto de manufatura anômalo e não anômalo, em que as imagens de referência são armazenadas como um conjunto de suporte; classificar o escore de distância de similaridade entre a imagem obtida e os pares de imagens de referência; e Petição 870230070037, de 08/08/2023, pág. 65/72 5 / 5 determinar se o produto de manufatura é anômalo com base no escore de distância de similaridade. 14. Sistema de acordo com a reivindicação 13, caracterizado pelo fato de que o processador é adicionalmente configurado para: ajustar um outro conjunto de suporte que compreende imagens de uma versão diferente do produto de manufatura usado para treinamento do modelo. 15. Sistema de acordo com a reivindicação 13 ou 14, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente um modelo de deep learning adicional configurado como um módulo detector de objeto, ODM, para identificar regiões de interesse, ROIs, relevantes nas múltiplas imagens de produto de manufatura. 16. Sistema de acordo com qualquer uma das reivindicações 13 a 15, caracterizado pelo fato de que o dispositivo de memória armazena o modelo de deep learning e o conjunto de suporte de imagens. 17. Sistema de acordo com qualquer uma das reivindicações 13 a 16, caracterizado pelo fato de que o modelo de deep learning retorna um tensor de saída (004) para cada imagem de consulta, em que o tensor de saída compreende as coordenadas de todos os objetos detectados e o resultado da inferência de classificação com base no escore de similaridade entre cada imagem de consulta e o conjunto de suporte. 18. Sistema de acordo com qualquer uma das reivindicações 13 a 17, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende uma cabine de aquisição (I) para automatizar a inspeção e compreendendo um sistema de formação de imagem, em que o sistema de formação de imagem compreende uma câmera fotográfica, um sistema de iluminação e sensores. 19. Mídia legível por computador não transitória, caracterizada pelo fato de que compreende instruções legíveis por computador armazenadas na mesma que, quando executadas em um processador, fazem com que o computador realize um método como definido em qualquer uma das reivindicações 1 a 12.

1. Method for training a neural network for detecting anomalies in a manufacturing product, the method characterized by the fact that it comprises: obtain (201, 401) a dataset that includes multiple manufacturing product images and annotation files with coordinates of predetermined anomalous regions in each manufacturing product image; selecting a test query set and a support set of images from the data set multiple times to train a deep learning model, wherein the support set of images comprises pairs of reference images and each pair comprises at least one anomalous and non-anomalous manufacturing product image; inputting the test query set (207, 404) into a deep learning model to infer a similarity score based on the latent space distance between pairs of reference images of the support set and the test query image; and adjusting the parameters of the deep learning model through a model based on the similarity score. 2. Method according to claim 1, characterized by the fact that it additionally comprises: generating (202) synthetic data by processing the raw data set to apply synthetic anomalies to the multiple manufacturing product images; apply the synthetic data to train a deep learning network, which aims to identify relevant regions of interest (ROIs) for each of the multiple manufacturing product images with symbolic anomalies. 3. Method according to claim 2, characterized by Petition 870230070037, dated 08/08/2023, page 62/72 2 / 5 fact that additionally comprises: generate (203) annotation files comprising coordinates of relevant ROIs and anomalous regions of the synthetic data; and generate (204) a composite dataset by applying data augmentation to the synthetic data. 4. Method according to claim 2 or 3, characterized in that it additionally comprises: train (205) an object detector module with the composite dataset to output a tensor object containing coordinates of each of the detected objects and their respective class identification; and adjust the output of the object detector module as the input of the similarity scoring model. 5. solution_context: Método para treinamento de uma rede neural para detecção de anomalias em um produto de manufatura, o método caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende: obter (201, 401) um conjunto de dados que inclui múltiplas imagens de produto de manufatura e arquivos de anotação com coordenadas de regiões anômalas predeterminadas em cada imagem de produto de manufatura; selecionar um conjunto de consulta de teste e um conjunto de suporte de imagens a partir do conjunto de dados múltiplas vezes para treinar um modelo de deep learning, em que o conjunto de suporte de imagens compreende pares de imagens de referência e cada par compreende pelo menos uma imagem de produto de manufatura anômalo e não anômalo; inserir o conjunto de consulta de teste (207, 404) em um modelo de deep learning para inferir um escore de similaridade com base na distância do espaço latente entre pares de imagens de referência do conjunto de suporte e a imagem de consulta de teste; e ajustar os parâmetros do modelo de deep learning por meio de um modelo com base no escore de similaridade. Método de acordo com a reivindicação 2 ou 3, caracterizado pelo fato de que compreende adicionalmente: treinar (205) um módulo detector de objeto com o conjunto de dados composto para transmitir um objeto tensorial que contém coordenadas de cada um dos objetos detectados e a respectiva identificação de classe; e ajustar a saída do módulo detector de objeto como a entrada do modelo de score de similaridade.

title: A SYSTEM AND A METHOD FOR HYBRID NOISE REMOVAL IN INFRARED IMAGES
abstract: ABSTRACT A SYSTEM AND A METHOD FOR HYBRID NOISE REMOVAL IN INFRARED IMAGES The present disclosure relates to a system (100) for hybrid noise removal in infrared images. The system comprises an input module (140) configured to receive an infrared image affected by noise and a preprocessing module (112) that adjusts contrast and brightness. The hybrid denoising module (102) integrates a Total Variance Denoising (TVD) unit (108) for reducing Gaussian noise and a modified Noise2Void (N2V) unit (110) utilizing a U-Net architecture (104) for reducing speckle noise, with the N2V unit learning a self-supervised mapping function (126) without requiring clean reference images. The postprocessing module (114) is configured to apply color balance and sharpness adjustments to the denoised infrared image (106). Finally, the output module (144) generates a denoised image (106) with reduced noise, while preserving critical edge and texture details, for applications requiring improved image clarity.
claims: WE CLAIM: 1. A system (100) for hybrid noise removal in infrared images, said system (100) comprising: • an input module (140) configured to receive an infrared image affected by noise; • a preprocessing module (112) configured to preprocess the infrared image by adjusting contrast and brightness; • a hybrid denoising module (102) comprising: o a Total Variance Denoising (TVD) unit (108) for reducing Gaussian noise; o a modified Noise2Void (N2V) unit (110) utilizing a U-Net architecture (104) for reducing speckle noise, the N2V unit (110) being configured to learn a self-supervised mapping function (126) without requiring clean reference images; • a postprocessing module (114) configured to apply color balance and sharpness adjustments to the denoised infrared image (106); and • an output module (144) configured to generate the final denoised infrared image (106) wherein noise is reduced while preserving edge and texture details of the original image. 2. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the U-Net architecture (104) in the modified N2V unit (110) comprises additional convolutional layers (120), dropout layers (122), and normalization layers (124) to optimize the denoising process for specific infrared image noise characteristics. 3. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, further comprises an adaptive parameter adjustment module (116) configured to adjust denoising parameters based on the analysis of noise patterns (118) detected in the infrared image . 4. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, further comprises a noise pattern analysis unit (118) configured to detect and classify noise patterns, including Gaussian and speckle noise, in real-time or near real-time environments (164). 5. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the input module (140) comprises: • a digital infrared camera (146) configured to capture real-time infrared images ; and • a GPU or dedicated hardware accelerator (148) to enable high-speed processing of infrared images. 6. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, further comprises a user interface module (150) configured to allow the users to: • select denoising parameters (152) for processing infrared images; and • review before and after denoised images (154) to assess the improvement in quality. 7. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the system (100) is configured to integrate with existing security, medical imaging, or industrial monitoring systems (156) for enhanced real-time noise removal and improved image clarity. 8. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the denoising effectiveness is evaluated using performance metrics, including Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) (130) and Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) (132). 9. The system (100) as claimed in claim 1, further comprises an environmental condition detection unit configured to automatically adjust denoising parameters based on ambient conditions such as light levels (158) and temperature (160) that affect the noise characteristics in the infrared images. 10. A method (200) for hybrid noise removal in infrared images, said method (200) comprising: • obtaining an infrared image affected by noise; • preprocessing said infrared image to adjust contrast or brightness; • applying a hybrid denoising technique (102) that integrates Total Variance Denoising (TVD) (108) for reducing Gaussian noise and a modified Noise2Void (N2V) approach (110) for reducing speckle noise, the modified N2V approach utilizing a U-Net architecture (104) to learn a mapping function (126) for denoising; • postprocessing the denoised infrared image (106) to adjust color balance and sharpness; and • outputting the denoised infrared image (106), wherein noise is reduced while preserving edge and texture details. 11. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, wherein the U-Net architecture (104) is customized with additional convolutional layers (120), dropout layers (122), and normalization layers (124) to enhance denoising performance for specific noise types said infrared images. 12. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, further comprises: • analysing noise patterns (118) in the infrared image to classify Gaussian and speckle noise; and • adjusting denoising parameters based on the detected noise patterns (118) using adaptive parameter adjustments (116). 13. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, wherein the preprocessing step includes enhancing the infrared image by adjusting the brightness, contrast, or sharpness using predefined parameters to improve the efficiency of the hybrid denoising technique (102). 14. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, further comprises integrating the hybrid denoising technique with security or monitoring systems (156) to enable real-time or near real-time noise removal in infrared image processing. 15. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, further comprises processing sequences of infrared images or video streams (134) for real-time noise removal, maintaining consistency and quality across multiple frames. 16. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, further comprises evaluating the denoising effectiveness using objective performance metrics, including Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) (130) and Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) (132). 17. The method (200) as claimed in claim 10, further comprises extracting critical information such as heat signatures (136) or movement details (138) from the denoised infrared image (106) for automated decision-making in surveillance, medical diagnostics, or industrial inspections. Dated this 24 th Day of January 2025 MOHAN RAJKUMAR DEWAN, IN/PA - 25 OF R. K. DEWAN & CO. AUTHORIZED AGENT OF APPLICANT TO, THE CONTROLLER OF PATENTS THE PATENT OFFICE, AT CHENNAI

title: A DISEASE SURVIVAL PREDICTION METHOD BASED ON MULTI-SCALE PATHOLOGICAL IMAGES AND MULTI-MODAL DATA; 一种基于多尺度病理图像与多模态数据的疾病生存预测方法
abstract:
本发明公开的属于信息科学技术领域，具体为一种基于多尺度病理图像与多模态数据的疾病生存预测方法，包括具体步骤如下：数字病理图像数据处理、基因表示数据处理、多模态数据交互、生存分析。本发明使用x40和x20两种放大倍数下所对应的图像块作为模型的输入，并且采用早期融合的策略实现多尺度信息的整合；相比于采用多视图WSI会产生重复计算相同位置的方法，本发明采用无重叠的图像分割分块方式，能够在一定程度上防止模型的过拟合，并且提高模型的效率。

The invention belongs to the field of information science and technology, specifically a disease survival prediction method based on multi-scale pathological images and multi-modal data, including the following specific steps: digital pathological image data processing, gene representation data processing, multi-modal data interaction, and survival analysis. The invention uses image blocks corresponding to two magnifications of x40 and x20 as the input of the model, and adopts an early fusion strategy to achieve the integration of multi-scale information; compared with the method of using multi-view WSI that will generate repeated calculations of the same position, the invention adopts a non-overlapping image segmentation and blocking method, which can prevent the overfitting of the model to a certain extent and improve the efficiency of the model.

RNN is an alternative to CNN for processing sequential data, and LSTM networks were first proposed to use special hidden units to remember inputs for a long time. title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR INTELLIGENT ANALYSIS AND HEIGHT PREDICTION BASED ON CHILDREN'S METACARPAL AND CARPAL X-RAYS; 一种基于儿童掌骨和腕骨X片的智能分析及身高预测方法及系统
abstract:
本申请提供一种基于儿童掌骨和腕骨X片的智能分析及身高预测方法及系统，包括：利用主成分分析方法分析包括骨骼生长速度、骨密度与骨骺线宽度减少间隔因素,运用随机森林算法解析所述因素之间的相关性,得到影响生长预测的关键因素；基于微型生物标记方法和监测系统,在骨骼关键区域部署相应的监测标记物,同时监控所述监测标记物随着骨骺线和软骨板的变化,得到骨骼发育的实时监控数据；对所述骨骼发育的实时监控数据进行处理和分析,包括采用小波变换算法对变化进行特征提取,并利用机器学习算法识别骨骼发育过程中的异常模式,以发现病理性变化。

The present application provides an intelligent analysis and height prediction method and system based on X-rays of children's metacarpals and wrist bones, including: using a principal component analysis method to analyze factors including bone growth rate, bone density and interval reduction of epiphyseal width, and using a random forest algorithm to analyze the correlation between the factors to obtain key factors affecting growth prediction; based on a micro-biomarker method and a monitoring system, deploying corresponding monitoring markers in key bone areas, and simultaneously monitoring the changes of the monitoring markers with the epiphyseal line and cartilage plate to obtain real-time monitoring data of bone development; processing and analyzing the real-time monitoring data of bone development, including using a wavelet transform algorithm to extract features of the changes, and using a machine learning algorithm to identify abnormal patterns in the bone development process to discover pathological changes.
claims:

对所述骨骼发育的实时监控数据进行处理和分析，包括采用小波变换算法对变化进行特征提取，并利用机器学习算法识别骨骼发育过程中的异常模式，以发现病理性变化； 结合影响骨骼发育的因素，通过构建的构建骨骺线消失时间预测模型预测骨骺线的消失时间，计算成人的最终身高，还包括:通过在不同年龄、性别和种族的儿童青少年群体中进行交叉验证检验骨骺线消失时间预测模型的普适性和准确性； 1 . An intelligent analysis and height prediction method based on X-rays of metacarpal bones and carpal bones of children, characterized in that the method comprises: using medical imaging methods to obtain bone images, locating and marking the positions of epiphyseal lines and growth plates through computer vision algorithms, identifying and measuring epiphyseal width, long bone length and bone protrusion morphology, segmenting the area in the image, and observing changes in epiphyseal line and long bone growth; using historical data on epiphyseal width reduction and long bone growth to predict its width change trend through an algorithm based on time series analysis, analyzing the relationship between width change and growth rate, and using a support vector regression algorithm to train a model based on the epiphyseal change rate, long bone length, physiological factors and growth rate data to predict the trend of growth plate sclerosis, long bone growth and epiphyseal closure; using principal component analysis methods to analyze factors including bone growth rate, bone density, long bone growth and epiphyseal width reduction interval factors, using a random forest algorithm to analyze the correlation between the factors, and obtaining key factors affecting growth prediction; Based on the micro-biomarker method and monitoring system, corresponding monitoring markers are deployed in key areas of the skeleton, and the monitoring markers are monitored as they change along the epiphyseal line and cartilage plate to obtain real-time monitoring data of bone development; the real-time monitoring data of bone development is processed and analyzed, including feature extraction of the changes using a wavelet transform algorithm, and identification of abnormal patterns in the bone development process using a machine learning algorithm to detect pathological changes; In combination with the factors that affect bone development, a model for predicting the disappearance time of the epiphyseal line is constructed to predict the disappearance time of the epiphyseal line and calculate the final height of an adult. It also includes: cross-validation in children and adolescents of different ages, genders and races to test the universality and accuracy of the model for predicting the disappearance time of the epiphyseal line; based on the data platform, the analysis of image scanning results, labeling data and growth prediction models are integrated to conduct long-term tracking of key skeletal areas. problem_context: 本申请提供一种基于儿童掌骨和腕骨X片的智能分析及身高预测方法及系统，包括：利用主成分分析方法分析包括骨骼生长速度、骨密度与骨骺线宽度减少间隔因素,运用随机森林算法解析所述因素之间的相关性,得到影响生长预测的关键因素；基于微型生物标记方法和监测系统,在骨骼关键区域部署相应的监测标记物,同时监控所述监测标记物随着骨骺线和软骨板的变化,得到骨骼发育的实时监控数据；对所述骨骼发育的实时监控数据进行处理和分析,包括采用小波变换算法对变化进行特征提取,并利用机器学习算法识别骨骼发育过程中的异常模式,以发现病理性变化。
solution_context: 本申请提供一种基于儿童掌骨和腕骨X片的智能分析及身高预测方法及系统，包括：利用主成分分析方法分析包括骨骼生长速度、骨密度与骨骺线宽度减少间隔因素,运用随机森林算法解析所述因素之间的相关性,得到影响生长预测的关键因素；基于微型生物标记方法和监测系统,在骨骼关键区域部署相应的监测标记物,同时监控所述监测标记物随着骨骺线和软骨板的变化,得到骨骼发育的实时监控数据；对所述骨骼发育的实时监控数据进行处理和分析,包括采用小波变换算法对变化进行特征提取,并利用机器学习算法识别骨骼发育过程中的异常模式,以发现病理性变化。 The present application provides an intelligent analysis and height prediction method and system based on X-rays of children's metacarpals and wrist bones, including: using a principal component analysis method to analyze factors including bone growth rate, bone density and interval reduction of epiphyseal width, and using a random forest algorithm to analyze the correlation between the factors to obtain key factors affecting growth prediction; based on a micro-biomarker method and a monitoring system, deploying corresponding monitoring markers in key bone areas, and simultaneously monitoring the changes of the monitoring markers with the epiphyseal line and cartilage plate to obtain real-time monitoring data of bone development; processing and analyzing the real-time monitoring data of bone development, including using a wavelet transform algorithm to extract features of the changes, and using a machine learning algorithm to identify abnormal patterns in the bone development process to discover pathological changes. 一种基于儿童掌骨和腕骨X片的智能分析及身高预测方法，其特征在于，所述方法包括： 采用医学影像方法获取骨骼图像，通过计算机视觉算法定位和标记骺线及生长板的位置,对骨骺线宽度、长骨长度和骨突形态进行识别和测量,对图像中的区域进行分割,观测骨骺线、长骨生长的变化； 利用历史数据中骨骺线的宽度减少、长骨生长的情况通过基于时间序列分析的算法预测其宽度变化趋势,分析宽度变化与生长速度之间的关系，根据骨骺线的变化速率、长骨长度、生理因素及生长速度数据，使用支持向量回归算法训练模型，以预测生长板硬化、长骨生长和骨骺线闭合的趋势； 利用主成分分析方法分析包括骨骼生长速度、骨密度、长骨生长与骨骺线宽度减少间隔因素,运用随机森林算法解析所述因素之间的相关性,得到影响生长预测的关键因素； 基于微型生物标记方法和监测系统，在骨骼关键区域部署相应的监测标记物，同时监控所述监测标记物随着骨骺线和软骨板的变化,得到骨骼发育的实时监控数据； 对所述骨骼发育的实时监控数据进行处理和分析，包括采用小波变换算法对变化进行特征提取，并利用机器学习算法识别骨骼发育过程中的异常模式，以发现病理性变化； 结合影响骨骼发育的因素，通过构建的构建骨骺线消失时间预测模型预测骨骺线的消失时间，计算成人的最终身高，还包括:通过在不同年龄、性别和种族的儿童青少年群体中进行交叉验证检验骨骺线消失时间预测模型的普适性和准确性； 基于数据平台，整合影像扫描结果、标记数据和生长预测模型的分析,对骨骼关键区域进行长期跟踪，其中，若预测结果显示儿童或青少年存在生长异常风险，则根据患者具体情况和历史医疗记录，使用个性化模型提供有针对性的矫正治疗方案,并动态监测患者的骨骼发育情况，更新生长预测结果,以指导后续治疗。

llm_reviewer_comment_short: 画像中の異常検出・分割とは近いが、医療・健康用途が主題で製造欠陥検出とは対象がずれる。
llm_reviewer_comment_detail: 課題文脈は欠陥・異常検出の目的を比較的よく表している。解決手段文脈は処理手順やモデル構成を読み取れる。技術手段は具体的なモデル・アルゴリズム名を含む。関連要素はあるものの、製造欠陥検出の代表例としては弱い。
human_reviewer_comment: 小児X線画像を用いた身長予測・骨発育分析が主題であり、画像処理手法は含むが製造欠陥検出候補としては不適切である。

title: A PERFORMANCE TESTING METHOD FOR TWISTED PAIR CABLES; 一种双绞电缆的性能测试方法
abstract:
本发明涉及电信号性能测试技术领域，尤其涉及一种双绞电缆的性能测试方法。所述方法包括以下步骤：获取双绞电缆图像；对双绞电缆图像进行外观检测，生成双绞电缆外观检测图像；利用边缘检测算法对双绞电缆外观检测图像进行磨损区域检测，得到低磨损双绞电缆图像；根据低磨损双绞电缆图像对双绞电缆样本进行筛选，得到低磨损双绞电缆样本；对低磨损双绞电缆样本进行仿真运行，从而获取低磨损双绞电缆运行数据；利用干扰判别检测公式对低磨损双绞电缆运行数据进行干扰判别，生成干扰电缆运行数据；本发明通过对电缆进行图像处理、仿真运行和自适应分析，以实现双绞电缆的性能测试方法。

The invention relates to the technical field of electrical signal performance testing, and in particular to a performance testing method for twisted pair cables. The method includes the following steps: obtaining a twisted pair cable image; performing appearance detection on the twisted pair cable image to generate a twisted pair cable appearance detection image; using an edge detection algorithm to detect wear areas on the twisted pair cable appearance detection image to obtain a low-wear pair Twisted cable images; filter twisted pair cable samples based on low wear twisted pair cable images to obtain low wear twisted pair cable samples; run simulations on low wear twisted pair cable samples to obtain low wear twisted pair cable operation data; use interference The discrimination and detection formula performs interference discrimination on low-wear twisted-pair cable operation data and generates interference cable operation data; the present invention implements a performance testing method for twisted-pair cables by performing image processing, simulation operation and adaptive analysis on the cable.

problem_context: 本发明涉及电信号性能测试技术领域，尤其涉及一种双绞电缆的性能测试方法。
solution_context: 本发明涉及电信号性能测试技术领域，尤其涉及一种双绞电缆的性能测试方法。 所述方法包括以下步骤：获取双绞电缆图像；对双绞电缆图像进行外观检测，生成双绞电缆外观检测图像；利用边缘检测算法对双绞电缆外观检测图像进行磨损区域检测，得到低磨损双绞电缆图像；根据低磨损双绞电缆图像对双绞电缆样本进行筛选，得到低磨损双绞电缆样本；对低磨损双绞电缆样本进行仿真运行，从而获取低磨损双绞电缆运行数据；利用干扰判别检测公式对低磨损双绞电缆运行数据进行干扰判别，生成干扰电缆运行数据；本发明通过对电缆进行图像处理、仿真运行和自适应分析，以实现双绞电缆的性能测试方法。 一种双绞电缆的性能测试方法，其特征在于，作用于双绞电缆样本，包括以下步骤： 步骤S1 ：获取双绞电缆图像；对双绞电缆图像进行外观检测，生成双绞电缆外观检测图像;利用边缘检测算法对双绞电缆外观检测图像进行磨损区域检测，得到低磨损双绞电缆图像； 步骤S2：根据低磨损双绞电缆图像对双绞电缆样本进行筛选，得到低磨损双绞电缆样本；对低磨损双绞电缆样本进行仿真运行，从而获取低磨损双绞电缆运行数据；利用干扰判别检测公式对低磨损双绞电缆运行数据进行干扰判别，生成干扰电缆运行数据； 步骤S3:对低磨损双绞电缆样本进行双向端口确认，生成发送端信号传输区域和接收端信号传输区域；利用结构回拨损耗检测公式对发送端信号传输区域和接收端信号传输区域进行信号反射频谱特性检测，生成电缆运行损耗数据； 步骤S4：将干扰电缆运行数据和电缆运行损耗数据进行数据整合，生成电缆性能综合数据；将电缆性能综合数据与预设的标准性能综合数据进行数据对比，生成正常干扰电缆性能测试数据和异常干扰电缆性能测试数据； 步骤S5:根据异常干扰电缆性能测试数据对双绞电缆样本进行通路构建处理，生成电缆连接通道;对电缆连接通道进行频率节点设置，生成电缆连接频率节点;对电缆连接频率节点进行动态频率扫描，生成异常电缆振幅数据和异常电缆相位数据； 步骤S6 ：利用LMS自适应滤波分析算法对异常电缆振幅数据和异常电缆相位数据进行自适应分析，生成异常电缆性能测试数据；将正常干扰电缆性能测试数据和异常干扰电缆性能测试数据进行信噪比分析，生成电缆综合测试结果数据。

title: A CARDIOPULMONARY ABNORMALITY DETECTION DEVICE AND EQUIPMENT; 一种心肺异常识别装置及设备
abstract:
本发明公开了一种心肺异常识别装置及设备。通过对全局特征图中非心肺区域的元素进行抑制，抑制非心肺区域的信息传递，避免非心肺区域的信息对心肺异常识别结果的干扰，提高了心肺异常识别的准确率和识别效率。通过预先基于阴性样本构建聚类编码本，并将降维特征图输入聚类编码本中进行检索，确定心肺异常识别结果，解决了阳性样本稀缺，导致无法开展有效的监督训练的问题，降低了标注成本，同时，采用从聚类编码本中检索的方式确定心肺异常识别结果，提高了识别效率。

This invention discloses a cardiopulmonary anomaly recognition device and apparatus. By suppressing elements in non-cardiopulmonary regions of the global feature map, information transmission from non-cardiopulmonary regions is inhibited, avoiding interference from non-cardiopulmonary region information on the cardiopulmonary anomaly recognition results, thus improving the accuracy and efficiency of cardiopulmonary anomaly recognition. By pre-constructing a clustered coding book based on negative samples and inputting the dimensionality-reduced feature map into the clustered coding book for retrieval to determine the cardiopulmonary anomaly recognition results, the problem of scarce positive samples leading to the inability to conduct effective supervised training is solved, reducing annotation costs. Furthermore, using a retrieval method from the clustered coding book to determine the cardiopulmonary anomaly recognition results improves recognition efficiency.

1 . A cardiopulmonary abnormality identification device, characterized in that it comprises: a global feature map extraction module, used to extract a global feature map representing global information from an acquired chest X-ray image; a local feature map extraction module, used to suppress elements in non-cardiopulmonary regions of the global feature map to obtain a local feature map representing information of the cardiopulmonary region; a dimensionality reduction processing module, used to perform dimensionality reduction processing on the local feature map to obtain a dimensionality-reduced feature map representing effective information of the local feature map; and a recognition result determination module, used to input the dimensionality-reduced feature map into a clustering encoding book pre-trained based on negative samples for retrieval to determine the cardiopulmonary abnormality identification result, wherein the cardiopulmonary abnormality identification result includes positive and negative; the dimensionality reduction processing module comprises: a principal component analysis submodule, used to perform principal component analysis on the local feature map to find a principal component feature map representing the principal components of the local feature map, wherein the dimension of the principal component feature map is smaller than the dimension of the local feature map; and a whitening processing submodule, used to perform whitening processing on the principal component feature map to obtain a dimensionality-reduced feature map representing effective information of the local feature map; the recognition result determination module comprises: The similarity calculation submodule is used to calculate the similarity between each principal component of the dimensionality-reduced feature map and N cluster centers in the clustering code, and obtain N similarity values corresponding to each principal component; The module selects intermediate similarity values by taking the maximum value among the N similarity values corresponding to each principal component as the intermediate similarity value, thus obtaining k intermediate similarity values corresponding to k principal components. The module selects target similarity values by taking the minimum value among the k intermediate similarity values as the target similarity value. The module determines whether the target similarity value is less than a preset value. The module determines a positive result if the target similarity value is less than the preset value, thus determining the cardiopulmonary abnormality identification result as positive. title: IMAGE ANOMALY DETECTION METHOD AND DEVICE BASED ON LAYERED VECTOR QUANTIZATION OF CONDITIONAL TRANSMISSION; 基于条件传输的分层矢量量化的图像异常检测方法及装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于条件传输的分层矢量量化的图像异常检测方法及装置，涉及图像处理技术领域，包括：将待处理图像输入至训练好的提取模型中，得到图像视觉特征；基于级联的编码器对图像视觉特征进行非本地多层次特征聚合，将每一层聚合的特征输入至相应的基于矢量量化的层，得到多层量化视觉特征；基于级联的解码器将图像视觉特征与多层量化视觉特征相继融合，再通过预设的混合专家模型进行重构；基于重构的图像视觉特征，通过测量基于条件传输分层特征差异，得到异常评分，实现异常检测和定位。本发明能够提高检测精度。

The present invention discloses an image anomaly detection method and device based on conditional transmission layered vector quantization, which relates to the field of image processing technology, including: inputting the image to be processed into a trained extraction model to obtain image visual features; performing non-local multi-level feature aggregation on the image visual features based on a cascade encoder, inputting the features of each layer of aggregation into a corresponding layer based on vector quantization, and obtaining multi-layer quantized visual features; a cascade decoder successively fuses the image visual features with the multi-layer quantized visual features, and then reconstructs them through a preset hybrid expert model; based on the reconstructed image visual features, anomaly scores are obtained by measuring the differences in layered features based on conditional transmission, thereby realizing anomaly detection and positioning. The present invention can improve detection accuracy.

problem_context: 本发明能够提高检测精度。
solution_context: 本发明公开了一种基于条件传输的分层矢量量化的图像异常检测方法及装置，涉及图像处理技术领域，包括：将待处理图像输入至训练好的提取模型中，得到图像视觉特征；基于级联的编码器对图像视觉特征进行非本地多层次特征聚合，将每一层聚合的特征输入至相应的基于矢量量化的层，得到多层量化视觉特征；基于级联的解码器将图像视觉特征与多层量化视觉特征相继融合，再通过预设的混合专家模型进行重构；基于重构的图像视觉特征，通过测量基于条件传输分层特征差异，得到异常评分，实现异常检测和定位。 本发明能够提高检测精度。 L 一种基于条件传输的分层矢量量化的图像异常检测方法，其特征在于，包括： 获取待处理图像； 将所述待处理图像输入至训练好的提取模型中,得到图像视觉特征； 基于级联的编码器对所述图像视觉特征进行非本地多层次特征聚合,将每一层聚合的特征输入至相应的基于矢量量化的层,得到多层量化视觉特征； 基于级联的解码器将所述图像视觉特征与所述多层量化视觉特征相继融合，再通过预设的混合专家模型进行重构； 基于重构的图像视觉特征,通过测量基于条件传输分层特征差异,得到异常评分,实现异常检测和定位。
technical_means: Transformer; Attention; 画像前処理; 画像生成・再構成; エンコーダ・デコーダ構造
effect_context: 本发明能够提高检测精度。
llm_reviewer_comment_short: 画像検査・異常検出への接点はあるが、対象や解決手段の対応は追加確認が必要である。

title: AN IMAGE ANOMALY DETECTION METHOD BASED ON SELF-SUPERVISED LEARNING AND FEATURE DENOISING; 一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，属于图像异常检测技术领域。包括深度特征提取、深度特征融合、深度特征重建、异常分割步骤。本发明充分利用深度学习模型多尺度特征的优点，对多尺度特征进行有效融合。同时，在融合多尺度特征之后，对其进行重建以实现降噪操作。并在模型最后添加分割头，以提升模型性能。与现有方法相比，本模型以同等级的参数量和训练成本达到了更好的异常检测效果。

The present invention discloses an image anomaly detection method based on self-supervised learning and feature denoising, and belongs to the technical field of image anomaly detection. The method includes deep feature extraction, deep feature fusion, deep feature reconstruction, and anomaly segmentation steps. The present invention makes full use of the advantages of multi-scale features of deep learning models and effectively fuses multi-scale features. At the same time, after fusing multi-scale features, they are reconstructed to achieve denoising operations. A segmentation head is added at the end of the model to improve model performance. Compared with existing methods, this model achieves better anomaly detection effects with the same level of parameter quantity and training cost.
claims:
1 .一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： 步骤1、采集正常图片后进行预处理以生成训练集，采集正常图片和异常图片后进行预处理以生成测试集，并针对训练集的图像生成人造异常， 步骤2、将异常图像和正常图像送入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型， 特征生成网络会分别生成正常图像和异常图像的深度特征，之后将异常图像的深度特征进行特征融合， 所述基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型结构分为特征生成网络、深度特征降噪网络和分割网络； 所述特征生成网络采用包含预训练权重的ResNet18模型，其是一个深度卷积神经网络模型，通过残差连接解决了梯度消失的问题;ResNet18模型包含了 18个层次，其中分为五个残差块和最后的全局平均池化层，残差块中每个卷积层后使用ReLU激活函数；所述 ResNet18模型采用在ImageNet数据集上与训练得到的网络权重:conv_5x和最后的全局平均池化， 步骤3、将进行特征融合后的异常图像的深度特征送入深度特征降噪网络，此时开始训练深度特征降噪网络，训练完成后，保存深度特征降噪网络的网络模型参数， 所述深度特征降噪网络包含编码器结构和解码器结构，其编码器结构为删除了第一个残差块：conv_1x和最后平均池化层的ResNet18模型，解码器结构是一个通过双线性上采样替换所有下采样的反向ResNet18模型，其中编码器和解码器的参数都是随机初始化的;在训练时，最小化特征提取网络和深度特征降噪网络相对应块的输出之间的余弦距离， 步骤4、开始训练分割网络，此时仅将异常图像送入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型中，训练完成后，保存分割网络的网络模型参数， 所述分割网络的结构为：计算特征生成网络和深度特征降噪网络的解码器相对应块的特征层之间的相似性，并将计算结果上采样到输入图片大小的四分之一，接着将其按顺序分别经过两个残差块，一个空洞空间金字塔池化模块进行后续处理，得到最后分割网络模型的输出结果;在训练时，最小化分割网络模型输出与人造异常的二进制掩码之间的聚焦损失和绝对误差损失L1之和； 步骤5、将步骤3中保存的深度特征降噪网络的模型参数和步骤4中保存的分割网络的模型参数分别加载进深度特征降噪网络和分割网络中，接着将用于检测的图片放入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型中进行检测，最后获得模型所输出的图像级异常检测结果和像素级异常检测结果。 2.根据权利要求1所述的一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，其特征在于，步骤1中针对正常图片的预处理和人造异常生成操作的具体过程如下： 步骤1.1、将用于训练的无异常图像统一截断成同样大小，放入一个训练集文件夹中， 并在测试集文件夹中放入正常图像和异常图像，所述正常图像和异常图像分开放置； 步骤1.2、针对训练集中的图像进行人造异常生成，由随机二维柏林噪声和预设阈值二值化后得到掩码M，通过用正常图像1 n 和来自外部数据源A的任意图像的线性组合替换掩码区域来生成异常图像1 a ，其中β表示不透明度因子， 1 a = B(MΘ A) + (rB)(MΘ 1 n ) + (1-m) Θ I n 。 3：根据权利要求1所述的一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，其特 1 .An image anomaly detection method based on self-supervised learning and feature denoising, characterized in that it comprises the following steps: Step 1, pre-processing normal images to generate a training set after collecting them, pre-processing normal images and abnormal images to generate a test set after collecting them, and generating artificial anomalies for the images in the training set, Step 2, sending the abnormal images and normal images to an image anomaly detection model based on self-supervised learning and feature denoising, The feature generation network will generate deep features of normal images and abnormal images respectively, and then feature fusion of the deep features of abnormal images, The structure of the image anomaly detection model based on self-supervised learning and feature denoising is divided into a feature generation network, a deep feature denoising network and a segmentation network; The feature generation network adopts the ResNet18 model including pre-trained weights, which is a deep convolutional neural network model. The problem of gradient disappearance is solved by residual connection; the ResNet18 model contains 18 levels, which are divided into five residual blocks and the final global average pooling layer. The ReLU activation function is used after each convolution layer in the residual block; the ResNet18 model adopts the network weights obtained by training on the ImageNet dataset: conv_5x and the final global average pooling. Step 3, the deep features of the abnormal image after feature fusion are sent to the deep feature denoising network. At this time, the deep feature denoising network is trained. After the training is completed, the network model parameters of the deep feature denoising network are saved. The deep feature denoising network includes an encoder structure and a decoder structure, wherein the encoder structure is a ResNet18 model in which the first residual block: conv_1x and the last average pooling layer are deleted, and the decoder structure is a reverse ResNet18 model in which all downsampling is replaced by bilinear upsampling, wherein the parameters of the encoder and the decoder are randomly initialized; during training, the cosine distance between the outputs of the corresponding blocks of the feature extraction network and the deep feature denoising network is minimized, Step 4, start training the segmentation network, at this time, only the abnormal image is sent to the image anomaly detection model based on self-supervised learning and feature denoising, after the training is completed, save the network model parameters of the segmentation network, the structure of the segmentation network is: calculate the similarity between the feature layers of the decoders of the feature generation network and the deep feature denoising network corresponding blocks, and upsample the calculation results to one-fourth of the size of the input image, and then sequentially pass them through two residual blocks and a void space pyramid pooling module for subsequent processing to obtain the output result of the final segmentation network model; during training, minimize the sum of the focus loss and the absolute error loss L1 between the output of the segmentation network model and the binary mask of the artificial anomaly; Step 5. problem_context: 本发明公开了一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，属于图像异常检测技术领域。
solution_context: 本发明公开了一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，属于图像异常检测技术领域。 包括深度特征提取、深度特征融合、深度特征重建、异常分割步骤。 1 .一种基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测方法，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： 步骤1、采集正常图片后进行预处理以生成训练集，采集正常图片和异常图片后进行预处理以生成测试集，并针对训练集的图像生成人造异常， 步骤2、将异常图像和正常图像送入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型， 特征生成网络会分别生成正常图像和异常图像的深度特征，之后将异常图像的深度特征进行特征融合， 所述基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型结构分为特征生成网络、深度特征降噪网络和分割网络； 所述特征生成网络采用包含预训练权重的ResNet18模型，其是一个深度卷积神经网络模型，通过残差连接解决了梯度消失的问题;ResNet18模型包含了 18个层次，其中分为五个残差块和最后的全局平均池化层，残差块中每个卷积层后使用ReLU激活函数；所述 ResNet18模型采用在ImageNet数据集上与训练得到的网络权重:conv_5x和最后的全局平均池化， 步骤3、将进行特征融合后的异常图像的深度特征送入深度特征降噪网络，此时开始训练深度特征降噪网络，训练完成后，保存深度特征降噪网络的网络模型参数， 所述深度特征降噪网络包含编码器结构和解码器结构，其编码器结构为删除了第一个残差块：conv_1x和最后平均池化层的ResNet18模型，解码器结构是一个通过双线性上采样替换所有下采样的反向ResNet18模型，其中编码器和解码器的参数都是随机初始化的;在训练时，最小化特征提取网络和深度特征降噪网络相对应块的输出之间的余弦距离， 步骤4、开始训练分割网络，此时仅将异常图像送入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型中，训练完成后，保存分割网络的网络模型参数， 所述分割网络的结构为：计算特征生成网络和深度特征降噪网络的解码器相对应块的特征层之间的相似性，并将计算结果上采样到输入图片大小的四分之一，接着将其按顺序分别经过两个残差块，一个空洞空间金字塔池化模块进行后续处理，得到最后分割网络模型的输出结果;在训练时，最小化分割网络模型输出与人造异常的二进制掩码之间的聚焦损失和绝对误差损失L1之和； 步骤5、将步骤3中保存的深度特征降噪网络的模型参数和步骤4中保存的分割网络的模型参数分别加载进深度特征降噪网络和分割网络中，接着将用于检测的图片放入基于自监督学习和特征降噪的图像异常检测模型中进行检测，最后获得模型所输出的图像级异常检测结果和像素级异常检测结果。

title: A SURFACE ANOMALY DETECTION METHOD AND APPARATUS BASED ON A CASCADED RECONSTRUCTION-DISCRIMINATION STRUCTURE; 基于级联的重构-判别结构的表面异常检测方法及装置
abstract:
本公开涉及一种基于级联的重构‑判别结构的表面异常检测方法及装置。所述方法包括：对待检测图像进行重构，得到第一重构图像；对所述第一重构图像进行重构，得到第二重构图像；将所述待检测图像与所述第一重构图像、所述第二重构图像分别从通道维拼接，得到第一异常分数图和第二异常分数图；通过对所述第一异常分数图和所述第二异常分数图逐像素平均处理，得到所述待检测图像的表明异常检测结果。本发明提升了表面异常检测的性能。

This disclosure relates to a method and apparatus for surface anomaly detection based on a cascaded reconstruction-discrimination structure. The method includes: reconstructing an image to be detected to obtain a first reconstructed image; reconstructing the first reconstructed image to obtain a second reconstructed image; concatenating the image to be detected with the first reconstructed image and the second reconstructed image along the channel dimension to obtain a first anomaly score map and a second anomaly score map; and obtaining a surface anomaly detection result for the image to be detected by averaging the first and second anomaly score maps pixel-by-pixel. This invention improves the performance of surface anomaly detection.

solution_context: 本公开涉及一种基于级联的重构‑判别结构的表面异常检测方法及装置。 所述方法包括：对待检测图像进行重构，得到第一重构图像；对所述第一重构图像进行重构，得到第二重构图像；将所述待检测图像与所述第一重构图像、所述第二重构图像分别从通道维拼接，得到第一异常分数图和第二异常分数图；通过对所述第一异常分数图和所述第二异常分数图逐像素平均处理，得到所述待检测图像的表明异常检测结果。 1 · 一种基于级联的重构-判别结构的表面异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述方法包括： 对待检测图像进行重构,得到第一重构图像； 对所述第一重构图像进行重构,得到第二重构图像； 将所述待检测图像与所述第一重构图像、所述第二重构图像分别从通道维拼接，得到第一异常分数图和第二异常分数图； 通过对所述第一异常分数图和所述第二异常分数图逐像素平均处理,得到所述待检测图像的表明异常检测结果； 其中，所述对所述待检测图像进行重构,得到第一重构图像,包括： 构建第一重构子网络，所述第一重构子网络采用jNet的编码器-解码器架构； 生成原始图像的纹理异常图像； 对原始图像进行非线性变换，以得到挤压结构图像、放大结构图像、旋转结构图像和波浪结构图像； 随机生成3个多边形和一个圆形区域,以分割标签Μ。

title: TRAIN VEHICLE CHASSIS PARTS ABNORMALITY DETECTION METHOD AND DEVICE, ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT AND MEDIUM; 列车车辆底盘零件异常检测方法和装置、电子设备及介质
abstract:
本发明实施例提供了一种列车车辆底盘零件异常检测方法和装置、电子设备及介质。该方法包括：通过相机拍摄获取列车车辆底盘不同视角的图像；采用深度学习算法构建U‑Net异常检测模型；通过U‑Net异常检测模型对图像进行分析，得到列车车辆底盘中目标零件的图像数据，其中，U‑Net异常检测模型包括有EfficientNets网络模型、Autoencoder模块和GAN模块；将图像数据转换成特征向量；将特征向量通过Autoencoder模块进行降维和重建，计算得到重建误差；在确定重建误差超过预设阈值的情况下，则判断目标零件发生列车车辆底盘零件异常事件。因此，能够有效检测不同种类的列车车辆底盘零件异常事件。

Embodiments of the present invention provide a method and device, electronic device, and medium for detecting abnormalities in train vehicle chassis parts. The method includes: capturing images of the train vehicle chassis from different perspectives using a camera; constructing a U-Net abnormality detection model using a deep learning algorithm; analyzing the images using the U-Net abnormality detection model to obtain image data of target parts in the train vehicle chassis, wherein the U-Net abnormality detection model includes an EfficientNets network model, an Autoencoder module, and a GAN module; converting the image data into a feature vector; performing dimensionality reduction and reconstruction on the feature vector using the Autoencoder module to calculate a reconstruction error; and determining that a train vehicle chassis part abnormality event has occurred in the target part if the reconstruction error exceeds a preset threshold. Therefore, it is possible to effectively detect abnormal events in different types of train vehicle chassis parts.

1 .A method for detecting abnormalities in a train vehicle chassis part, characterized in that the method comprises: acquiring images of a train vehicle chassis from different perspectives by taking pictures with a camera; constructing a U-Net abnormality detection model using a deep learning algorithm; analyzing the images using the U-Net abnormality detection model to obtain image data of a target part in the train vehicle chassis, wherein the U-Net abnormality detection model comprises an EfficientNets network model, an Autoencoder module, and a GAN module; converting the image data into a feature vector; performing dimensionality reduction and reconstruction on the feature vector using the Autoencoder module to calculate a reconstruction error; if it is determined that the reconstruction error exceeds a preset threshold, determining that a train vehicle chassis part abnormality event has occurred in the target part; wherein the U-Net abnormality detection model is trained as follows: calculating the reconstruction error of each normal sample using the Autoencoder module; generating abnormal samples from the reconstruction error that are greater in number than the normal samples using the GAN module; mixing the normal samples and the generated abnormal samples to form a new data set, and training using a binary classification model to obtain the trained U-Net abnormality detection model. 2 .The method according to claim 1 is characterized in that before analyzing the image through the U-Net anomaly detection model to obtain image data of the target parts in the train vehicle chassis, wherein the U-Net anomaly detection model includes an EfficientNets network model, an Autoencoder module and a GAN module, it also includes: using the YOLOv7 target detection algorithm to process the image and identify the target parts in the image. 3 .The method according to claim 2 is characterized in that the EfficientNets is used as an encoder of the U-Net anomaly detection model to improve the feature extraction and representation capabilities of the U-Net anomaly detection model. 4 .The method according to claim 1 is characterized in that the method further comprises: obtaining the world coordinates of the target part through a calibration algorithm. 5 .The method according to claim 4 is characterized in that the world coordinates of the target part are obtained through the calibration algorithm, including: obtaining the internal parameters of the camera; calculating the translation vector of the camera model perpendicular to the target part; calculating the rotation matrix of the world coordinate system around the image coordinate system; obtaining the coordinate transformation relationship between the image coordinates and the world coordinates in combination with the actual position of the camera; and obtaining the world coordinates of the target part based on the coordinate transformation relationship. 6 .The method according to any one of claims 1 to 5 is characterized in that, when it is determined that the reconstruction error exceeds a preset threshold, after judging that the target part has an abnormal event of a train vehicle chassis part, it also includes: issuing an early warning and reporting of the abnormal event of the train vehicle chassis part, wherein the abnormal event of the train vehicle chassis part includes a broken train vehicle chassis drive shaft, loose train vehicle brakes, and damaged or lost train vehicle shock absorbers. 7 .A train vehicle chassis parts anomaly detection device, characterized in that the device comprises: a shooting module for capturing images of the train vehicle chassis from different perspectives through a camera; a building module for building a U-Net anomaly detection model using a deep learning algorithm; an analysis module for analyzing the image using the U-Net anomaly detection model to obtain the train vehicle chassis parts anomaly detection model. Image data of target parts in the chassis, wherein the U-Net anomaly detection model includes an EfficientNets network model, an Autoencoder module and a GAN module; a conversion module, used to convert the image data into a feature vector; a reconstruction module, used to reduce the dimension and reconstruct the feature vector through the Autoencoder module, and calculate the reconstruction error; a judgment module, used to judge that an abnormal event of a train vehicle chassis part has occurred in the target part when it is determined that the reconstruction error exceeds a preset threshold; wherein the training method of the U-Net anomaly detection model is as follows: use the Autoencoder module to calculate the reconstruction error of each normal sample; use the GAN module to generate more abnormal samples than the normal samples from the reconstruction error; mix the normal samples and the generated abnormal samples together to form a new data set, and use a binary classification model for training to obtain the trained U-Net anomaly detection model. 8 .An electronic device, characterized in that the electronic device includes a memory and a processor, the memory stores a computer program, and the processor implements the train vehicle chassis parts abnormality detection method according to any one of claims 1 to 6 when executing the computer program. 9 .A computer-readable storage medium storing a computer program, wherein the computer program, when executed by a processor, implements the train vehicle chassis parts abnormality detection method according to any one of claims 1 to 6.

title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR REAL-TIME MONITORING AND ABNORMAL LOCATION OF MULTI-DIMENSIONAL DATA IN COAL MINING INDUSTRY; 一种煤矿业多维度数据实时监控与异常定位方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种煤矿业多维度数据实时监控与异常定位方法及系统，包括：采集煤矿作业中的实时数据，进行预处理。对预处理后的数据进行维度构建，对不同维度的数据进行融合，形成多维数据。将多维数据输入异常检测模型，对异常数据进行回溯分析。根据检测到的异常和回溯分析，进行异常处理与响应。本发明提供的煤矿业多维度数据实时监控与异常定位方法及系统对不同维度数据进行关联性分析与融合，使用主成分分析提取关键特征，并结合非线性变换，确保多维数据的高效融合。不仅保留了主要信息，还通过增强特征的代表性，提升了异常检测的准确性。缩短异常响应时间，提高应急处理的精确度。

The present invention discloses a method and system for real-time monitoring and abnormality location of multi-dimensional data in the coal mining industry, including: collecting real-time data in coal mining operations and performing preprocessing. Dimensional construction is performed on the preprocessed data, and data of different dimensions are fused to form multi-dimensional data. The multi-dimensional data is input into an anomaly detection model, and a retrospective analysis is performed on the abnormal data. According to the detected anomalies and retrospective analysis, abnormality processing and response are performed. The method and system for real-time monitoring and abnormality location of multi-dimensional data in the coal mining industry provided by the present invention performs correlation analysis and fusion of data of different dimensions, uses principal component analysis to extract key features, and combines nonlinear transformation to ensure efficient fusion of multi-dimensional data. Not only the main information is retained, but also the accuracy of anomaly detection is improved by enhancing the representativeness of the features. The abnormal response time is shortened and the accuracy of emergency processing is improved.

title: A KIND OF TRANSMISSION LINE PIN STATE DETECTION METHOD AND DETECTION SYSTEM; 一种输电线路销钉状态检测方法和检测系统
abstract:
本发明提供一种输电线路销钉状态检测方法和检测系统，其中，检测方法包括以下步骤：获取包含定位悬链线支撑装置的输电线路图像；定位悬链线支撑装置设有多个关节组件，关节组件包括销钉；将输电线路图像输入到预训练的第一神经网络模型中，得到关节组件在输电线路图像中的位置信息；根据关节组件在输电线路图像的位置信息，从输电线路图像中提取出关节组件图像；将关节组件图像输入到预训练的第二神经网络模型中，得到销钉在关节组件图像中的位置信息；根据销钉在关节组件图像中的位置信息，从关节组件图像中提取出销钉图像；将销钉图像输入到预训练的第三神经网络模型中，得到销钉的状态结果。本发明可以提高对销钉状态的检测效率和准确性。

The present invention provides a method and system for detecting the state of a pin of a transmission line, wherein the detection method includes the following steps: acquiring an image of a transmission line including a positioning catenary support device; the positioning catenary support device is provided with a plurality of joint components, and the joint The component includes a pin; the transmission line image is input into the pre-trained first neural network model to obtain the position information of the joint component in the transmission line image; according to the position information of the joint component in the transmission line image, it is extracted from the transmission line image. joint component image; input the joint component image into the pre-trained second neural network model to obtain the position information of the pin in the joint component image; extract the pin from the joint component image according to the position information of the pin in the joint component image image; input the pin image into the pre-trained third neural network model to get the state result of the pin. The invention can improve the detection efficiency and accuracy of the pin state.

title: METHOD FOR PROVIDING OUTLINE INSPECTION SERVICE; 외형 검사 서비스의 제공 방법
abstract:
본 개시의 몇몇 실시예에 따른, 적어도 하나의 프로세서를 포함하는 컴퓨팅 장치에 의해 수행되는 외형 검사 서비스를 제공하기 위한 방법이 개시된다. 상기 외형 검사 서비스를 제공하기 위한 방법은 제 1 제품과 관련된 복수의 시점(point of view)이 사전 설정된 도면 데이터를 획득하는 단계; 상기 도면 데이터에 포함된 상기 제 1 제품과 관련된 제 1 오브젝트를 추출하는 단계; 상기 제 1 오브젝트에 기초하여 상기 복수의 시점 각각에 대한 복수의 제 1 도면 및 상기 복수의 시점 각각에 대한 가이드 라인을 생성하는 단계 - 상기 제 1 도면은 상기 제 1 오브젝트와 관련된 치수가 제거된 도면이고, 상기 가이드 라인은 상기 제 1 오브젝트의 중심을 나타내기 위한 사각형 또는 십자선을 포함함 - ; 상기 복수의 시점 각각에 대한 가이드 라인을 제공함으로써 상기 복수의 시점 각각에 대응하는 상기 제 1 제품의 복수의 촬영 사진을 획득하는 단계; 상기 복수의 촬영 사진 각각에 포함된 상기 제 1 제품과 관련된 복수의 제 2 오브젝트를 추출하는 단계; 및 상기 복수의 제 1 도면 및 상기 복수의 제 1 도면 각각에 대응하는 상기 복수의 제 2 오브젝트를 매핑하여 미리 학습된 인공 신경망에 입력함으로써 유사도를 결정하고, 상기 유사도에 기초하여 상기 제 1 제품의 외형 검사를 수행하는 단계를 포함할 수 있다.

According to some embodiments of the present disclosure, a method for providing an appearance inspection service performed by a computing device including at least one processor is disclosed. The method for providing the appearance inspection service includes obtaining drawing data in which a plurality of points of view related to a first product are preset; extracting a first object related to the first product included in the drawing data; Generating a plurality of first drawings for each of the plurality of viewpoints and a guide line for each of the plurality of viewpoints based on the first object - the first drawing is a drawing with dimensions related to the first object removed, and the guide line includes a square or crosshair to indicate the center of the first object. Obtaining a plurality of photographs of the first product corresponding to each of the plurality of viewpoints by providing a guideline for each of the plurality of viewpoints; extracting a plurality of second objects related to the first product included in each of the plurality of captured photos; and mapping the plurality of first drawings and the plurality of second objects corresponding to each of the plurality of first drawings and inputting them into a pre-trained artificial neural network to determine the degree of similarity, and based on the degree of similarity, determining the degree of similarity of the first product. It may include performing an appearance inspection.

A method for providing an appearance inspection service performed by a computing device including at least one processor, comprising: obtaining drawing data with a plurality of points of view related to a first product preset; extracting a first object related to the first product included in the drawing data; Generating a plurality of first drawings for each of the plurality of viewpoints and a guide line for each of the plurality of viewpoints based on the first object - the first drawing is a drawing with dimensions related to the first object removed, and the guide line includes a square or crosshair to indicate the center of the first object. Obtaining a plurality of photographs of the first product corresponding to each of the plurality of viewpoints by providing a guideline for each of the plurality of viewpoints; extracting a plurality of second objects related to the first product included in each of the plurality of captured photos; and mapping the plurality of first drawings and the plurality of second objects corresponding to each of the plurality of first drawings and inputting them into a pre-trained artificial neural network to determine the degree of similarity, and based on the degree of similarity, determining the degree of similarity of the first product. performing a visual inspection; A method for providing an appearance inspection service, including. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating a plurality of first drawings for each of the plurality of viewpoints and a guide line for each of the plurality of viewpoints based on the first object comprises: the drawing data being 3D modeling-based data; In this case, generating the plurality of first drawings by aligning the first objects included in the 3D modeling-based data based on each of the plurality of viewpoints according to the projection method; or when the drawing data is 2D drawing data, determining the plurality of first drawings in which the first object is drawn for each of the plurality of viewpoints; A method for providing an appearance inspection service, including. The method of claim 1, wherein the step of generating a guide line for each of the plurality of viewpoints includes inserting a predetermined color into an inner area of at least one closed curve constituting the first object included in the first drawing.; performing binarization on the 1-1 drawing in which the predetermined color is inserted; extracting an outline from the binarized drawing 1-1; and generating the guide line based on the outline; A method for providing an appearance inspection service, including. The method of claim 3, wherein the step of obtaining a plurality of photographs of the first product corresponding to each of the plurality of viewpoints by providing a guideline for each of the plurality of viewpoints comprises: photographing the first product from a user. Upon receiving an input for, determining a first viewpoint of the first product being displayed on a display unit; determining whether a first guideline corresponding to the first time point exists; If the first guideline exists, obtaining a plurality of photographs of the first product corresponding to the first viewpoint by providing the first guideline; Or, if the first guideline does not exist, align the first object to the first viewpoint to create a second guideline, and provide the generated second guideline to correspond to the first viewpoint. Obtaining a plurality of photographs of the first product; A method for providing an appearance inspection service, including. The method of claim 1, wherein the artificial neural network is a transfer learned model using a small data set related to the first product.

title: IMAGE PROCESSING METHOD, DEVICE, VISUAL INSPECTION EQUIPMENT, SCHEDULING MODULE AND MEDIUM; 图像处理方法、装置、视觉检测设备、调度模块及介质
abstract:
本申请实施例提供了一种图像处理方法、装置、视觉检测设备、调度模块及介质。方案如下：针对多个处理模块组中的第一处理模块组，获取第一处理模块组当前待处理的目标图像数据；若第一处理模块组中每一处理模块的当前状态均为非空闲状态，则在第一处理模块组中存在当前状态为空闲状态的目标处理模块时，或者，在第一处理模块组中构建新的处理模块作为目标处理模块的情况下，向目标处理模块发送目标图像数据，以使目标处理模块基于目标图像数据进行图像处理，得到对应的图像数据处理结果。通过本申请实施例的技术方案，提高了图像处理的并发性和及时性。

Embodiments of the present application provide an image processing method, apparatus, visual inspection device, scheduling module, and medium. The scheme is as follows: for the first processing module group in the multiple processing module groups, obtain the target image data currently to be processed by the first processing module group; if the current state of each processing module in the first processing module group is a non-idle state , when there is a target processing module whose current state is an idle state in the first processing module group, or when a new processing module is constructed as the target processing module in the first processing module group, the target image is sent to the target processing module data, so that the target processing module performs image processing based on the target image data to obtain corresponding image data processing results. Through the technical solutions of the embodiments of the present application, the concurrency and timeliness of image processing are improved.
